use tree_sitter::{Parser, Query, QueryCursor};

fn find_test_functions(query: &Query, cursor: &mut QueryCursor, tree: &tree_sitter::Tree, source: &str) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for mat in cursor.matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes()) {
        for capture in mat.captures.iter() {
            let node = capture.node;
            let text = &source[node.start_byte()..node.end_byte()];
            if text.starts_with("test_") {
                results.push(text.to_string());
            }
        }
    }
    results
}

fn find_matching_nodes_filtered(
    query: &Query,
    cursor: &mut QueryCursor,
    tree: &tree_sitter::Tree,
    source: &str,
    min_len: usize,
) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut names = Vec::new();
    for mat in cursor.matches(query, tree.root_node(), source.as_bytes()) {
        for capture in mat.captures.iter() {
            let text = &source[capture.node.start_byte()..capture.node.end_byte()];
            if text.len() > min_len {
                names.push(text.to_string());
            }
        }
    }
    names
}
